steps.title: Identify how the action fulfills the goal
steps.content: The first sentence describes her goal (coordinating suffragists); the second describes a specific action (founding an organization). The decisive signal is that this action is the concrete way she pursued that goal.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
”To that end,” perfectly expresses this relationship—it shows the action directly serves the stated goal. The others misconstrue the logic: they either restate the same idea, introduce contrast where none exists, or suggest alternatives instead of execution method.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
